## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss recruitment details and requirements for GrowthX's open positions with Somewhere.Com, LLC.](https://fathom.video/share/y4vxKeXLFzGUTs8KzQYtzLV5r33XuXUp?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Three priority positions: Account Manager (highest), Content Writer, Managing Editor](https://fathom.video/share/y4vxKeXLFzGUTs8KzQYtzLV5r33XuXUp?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Seeking candidates with intellectual curiosity, startup experience, and AI familiarity](https://fathom.video/share/y4vxKeXLFzGUTs8KzQYtzLV5r33XuXUp?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Account Managers should be content-focused with SEO skills, not primarily SEO experts](https://fathom.video/share/y4vxKeXLFzGUTs8KzQYtzLV5r33XuXUp?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
  - [Global team with 4+ hours Pacific Time overlap required; some flexibility possible](https://fathom.video/share/y4vxKeXLFzGUTs8KzQYtzLV5r33XuXUp?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

## Topics

### Position Details and Priorities

  - [Account Manager (highest priority), Content Writer, Managing Editor](https://fathom.video/share/y4vxKeXLFzGUTs8KzQYtzLV5r33XuXUp?tab=summary&timestamp=803.0)
  - [Job descriptions available on GrowthX website](https://fathom.video/share/y4vxKeXLFzGUTs8KzQYtzLV5r33XuXUp?tab=summary&timestamp=36.0)
  - [Content Writer, not Copywriter (important distinction)](https://fathom.video/share/y4vxKeXLFzGUTs8KzQYtzLV5r33XuXUp?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Specialized candidates preferred, especially in health, AI, or security](https://fathom.video/share/y4vxKeXLFzGUTs8KzQYtzLV5r33XuXUp?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)

### Candidate Requirements

  - [4+ hours overlap with Pacific Time Zone](https://fathom.video/share/y4vxKeXLFzGUTs8KzQYtzLV5r33XuXUp?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Global workforce acceptable (current team spans Asia, Europe, South Pacific)](https://fathom.video/share/y4vxKeXLFzGUTs8KzQYtzLV5r33XuXUp?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
  - [Intellectual curiosity and learning ability crucial](https://fathom.video/share/y4vxKeXLFzGUTs8KzQYtzLV5r33XuXUp?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Startup/fast-growth environment experience valuable](https://fathom.video/share/y4vxKeXLFzGUTs8KzQYtzLV5r33XuXUp?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [AI tool familiarity and usage a significant plus](https://fathom.video/share/y4vxKeXLFzGUTs8KzQYtzLV5r33XuXUp?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)

### Account Manager Specifics

  - [Content-first background preferred over pure SEO expertise](https://fathom.video/share/y4vxKeXLFzGUTs8KzQYtzLV5r33XuXUp?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
  - [Should understand how to elevate content quality while applying SEO principles](https://fathom.video/share/y4vxKeXLFzGUTs8KzQYtzLV5r33XuXUp?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Title may change from "Account Manager" in the future](https://fathom.video/share/y4vxKeXLFzGUTs8KzQYtzLV5r33XuXUp?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)

### Recruitment Process

  - [Somewhere.Com to create job descriptions based on GrowthX website](https://fathom.video/share/y4vxKeXLFzGUTs8KzQYtzLV5r33XuXUp?tab=summary&timestamp=36.0)
  - [5-7 candidates per role expected by Thursday](https://fathom.video/share/y4vxKeXLFzGUTs8KzQYtzLV5r33XuXUp?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)
  - [Somewhere.Com to conduct initial vetting, including video interviews](https://fathom.video/share/y4vxKeXLFzGUTs8KzQYtzLV5r33XuXUp?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)
  - [Candidate profiles will include conversation notes, skill breakdowns, and recruiter opinions](https://fathom.video/share/y4vxKeXLFzGUTs8KzQYtzLV5r33XuXUp?tab=summary&timestamp=877.0)

### Communication and Tools

  - [Slack channel to be set up for seamless communication](https://fathom.video/share/y4vxKeXLFzGUTs8KzQYtzLV5r33XuXUp?tab=summary&timestamp=956.0)
  - [GrowthX may provide a recorded pitch video for candidates](https://fathom.video/share/y4vxKeXLFzGUTs8KzQYtzLV5r33XuXUp?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Austin to pull job descriptions from GrowthX website and share with his team](https://fathom.video/share/y4vxKeXLFzGUTs8KzQYtzLV5r33XuXUp?tab=summary&timestamp=36.0)
  - [Somewhere.Com team to start sourcing candidates immediately](https://fathom.video/share/y4vxKeXLFzGUTs8KzQYtzLV5r33XuXUp?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Austin to accept Slack invitation and add his team members](https://fathom.video/share/y4vxKeXLFzGUTs8KzQYtzLV5r33XuXUp?tab=summary&timestamp=961.0)
  - [GrowthX to potentially provide a recorded pitch video for candidates](https://fathom.video/share/y4vxKeXLFzGUTs8KzQYtzLV5r33XuXUp?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Somewhere.Com to deliver initial batch of vetted candidates by Thursday](https://fathom.video/share/y4vxKeXLFzGUTs8KzQYtzLV5r33XuXUp?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)
